title: Building a Production-Ready RAG System in Python: Beyond the Tutorial
excerpt: Most RAG tutorials get you to a working demo in 50 lines. This article covers what comes next — chunking strategies, retrieval quality, reranking, latency budgets, and the failure modes nobody warns you about.

title: Django vs FastAPI: A Practical Decision Framework
excerpt: Both Django and FastAPI are excellent Python web frameworks, but they optimise for different things. Here is the framework I use to choose between them based on the specific constraints of each project.
